Welcome to Parkview

We care about the person in the chair — not just the teeth

Parkview Family Dentistry is a calm, modern practice in the heart of Nungambakkam. Whether you're here for a routine clean, your child's first visit, or a smile makeover you've thought about for years, we take time to understand your health, your goals and your past experiences first.

When you take care of your mouth, your whole body benefits. That belief shapes everything we do — gentle, thorough and refreshingly clear.

All agesToddlers to grandparents
Same-dayCrowns & emergencies
EMIEasy treatment plans
Meet your dentist

Dr. Kavya Rajan

Dr. Kavya leads Parkview with a steady, reassuring hand and a genuine love for the craft of dentistry. Known for her gentle approach and honest explanations, she blends modern cosmetic and family care with a whole-body view of health.

She believes the best dentistry is the kind you barely notice — comfortable, unhurried and built entirely around you.

BDS, MDS Cosmetic & Family Dentistry Invisalign Provider
— Dr. Kavya Rajan
4.9 / 5.0Loved by patients

Warm faces you'll be glad to know

From your first hello at the desk to your final polish, you're in the hands of people who genuinely enjoy looking after you.

Patient Care

Dentistry done differently

Three things you'll feel from the first visit

Personalised care

We start with you — your health history, your worries, your goals — then build a plan that actually fits your life. No templates, no rush.

Financial clarity

You'll always know the cost before we begin. Transparent estimates, insurance help and easy EMI plans — so money is never a shock.

Comfort add-ons

Numbing that works, calming options for anxious visits, blankets, headphones and a ceiling screen — the little things that change everything.

Thinking about it?

Considering a smile transformation? Let's talk — on us.

Book a complimentary consultation with Dr. Kavya. We'll listen to what you'd love to change, walk through your options, and give you an honest plan with clear costs. No pressure, ever.

Book your free consult WhatsApp us

Refer your friends!

Invite your family, neighbours — or that colleague who keeps saying they need a new dentist. When they come in for their first visit, you'll each get ₹2,000 toward treatment. Good smiles are better shared.

Refer a friend
Our services

Everything your family needs, under one calm roof

From the everyday to the transformational, our care falls into three simple ideas — maintain what's healthy, protect what's vulnerable, and enhance what makes you smile. Whatever you need, we'll meet you exactly where you are.

See if we're right for you

Maintain

  • Exams & cleanings
  • Kids' dentistry
  • Gum health
  • Digital X-rays

Protect

  • Fillings & sealants
  • Root canal therapy
  • Night & sports guards
  • Emergency care

Enhance

  • Invisalign clear aligners
  • Veneers & bonding
  • Teeth whitening
  • Implants & crowns
A high-tech experience

Innovative technology for stunning, precise results

We've invested in tools that make your time with us faster, calmer and more accurate — so we can catch problems earlier and treat them with less fuss.

  • Digital 3D scanningNo goopy moulds — a quick, comfortable scan instead.
  • Same-day crownsIn-house milling means no temporaries and no second trip.
  • Gentle laser dentistryOften little to no anaesthesia, less noise and faster healing.
Whole-body wellness

Where oral function meets how you feel all day

Snoring, grinding, restless sleep, frequent headaches — your mouth often holds the clues. We look beyond the teeth at your airway, bite and jaw to understand what's really going on.

With custom night guards and comfortable sleep-and-airway appliances, many of our patients sleep more deeply and wake up feeling like themselves again.

Ask about sleep & airway
See what's possible

Real changes, natural-looking results

We enhance what's already there — never to make you look like someone else. Drag the slider to see the difference.

Before After
Smile makeover

Straightened, evened and brightened

Clear aligners and gentle whitening closed a small gap and lifted the shade — without touching the natural character of her smile. Most makeovers like this take just a few unhurried visits.

It's all in the details

A smile that feels real, natural and uniquely you

Whether you want a brighter shade or to keep the lived-in character of your natural teeth, we design every result around your face and your wishes — right down to tooth shape and shade. The goal is never “perfect.” It's you, at your most confident.

CustomShade & shape matching
